title: Harbor Wright
hypothesis: Combine Misty Harbor's tuned playbook prompt language with Wertox-style high-diversity candidate generation, bracket selection, and stronger preserve-list repair continuity.
risk_notes: This is an intentionally higher-variance runtime profile than Misty Harbor or Cinder Vector.
The code keeps Misty Harbor's prompt/playbook language intact and changes only config plumbing plus session continuity.
The aggressive top_p/top_k/min_p/repetition knobs are now wired through to coder sessions and critic calls.
The Docker structure is intentionally unchanged so this can be packaged as a small delta layer from Misty Harbor.
